bug_data.description:
Update the Wikipedia suggestions row UI. See [the Figma spec](https://www.figma.com/design/HlHYKdDVCszbbpjuovBDjg/Carrots---S-S-Online-Explorations?node-id=6584-5018&t=Xg06pmlLPj9lmpCj-0):

* The title should be "[article title] · Wikipedia", but offhand I'm not sure that's possible since the titles are defined in the RS and Merino data. We may have to ignore that part, at least for now, and do it as a follow-up.
* Show "Recommended" as the bottom text
* The icon size should *not* change now since that will be done later as part of Nova
* Show URL at the bottom on hover/selection? Check with Paul et al. first since Wikipedia suggestions currently do not show URL
bug_data.creator: adw@mozilla.com
bug_data.summary: Update the Wikipedia suggestions row UI

comments.raw_text: The Figma shows a higher-placement Wikipedia (top pick) but that's just to illustrate what an "informational" top pick would look like. Wikipedia should continue to be lower-placement.

bug_analysis.root_cause: The existing Wikipedia suggestions row UI needed to be updated to match the new Figma design specification, including changes to title format, bottom text, and icon sizing.
symptoms: Outdated Wikipedia suggestions UI in the address bar
Title format not as '[article title] · Wikipedia'
Icon size inconsistent with design spec
reproduction_steps: Trigger Wikipedia suggestions in Firefox Suggest
Observe the UI of the Wikipedia suggestions row
bug_analysis.technical_details: The update involved changing the UI to show 'Recommended' as bottom text, maintaining icon size for now, and deferring title format changes due to RS and Merino data constraints. The patch depended on D280386 and was pushed with review by daisuke.
bug_analysis.user_impact: Users see an improved and updated UI for Wikipedia suggestions in the address bar, enhancing clarity and consistency with design specs.

common_patterns: Crashes occurring during UI-related operations (e.g., updating suggestion rows, opening tabs)
Crashes involving memory exhaustion or OOM conditions
Crashes happening early in the application lifecycle (e.g., startup)
Crashes referencing native libraries like libc.so, libart.so, or libbase.so
potential_root_causes: Memory leaks or excessive memory usage leading to OOM conditions
Race conditions or deadlocks when interacting with UI components
Faulty or unoptimized native code invoked during UI updates
Resource starvation during startup or tab activation
relevant_fix_clues: No bugs listed have a resolved status or explicit fix details
The mention of OOM in the 'inactive tabs' bug suggests memory exhaustion as a key factor
Crashes in native libraries at startup hint at possible initialization or resource allocation issues
similar_bugs_context.summary: These similar bugs suggest that the crashes stem from unstable interactions between UI updates and underlying native code, often exacerbated by memory pressure or resource management issues. The recurrence of OOM conditions and crashes in native libraries during UI-related operations imply that memory handling and initialization sequences are the likely root causes.

similar_bugs_data.summary: opening 'inactive tabs' hangs and crashes probably due to OOM
startup Crash in [@ libc.so | libart.so | libbase.so]

refined_analysis.root_cause: The Wikipedia suggestion row in the Firefox address bar UI is missing the bottom 'Recommended' label, uses outdated title formatting, and displays icons at incorrect sizes, deviating from the current Figma design.
symptoms: Wikipedia suggestions in the address bar lack the 'Recommended' label below the suggestion text
Suggestion titles are not formatted as '[article title] · Wikipedia'
Icons are rendered at inconsistent sizes compared to design specs
reproduction_steps: Trigger Wikipedia suggestions via Firefox Suggest
Observe the Wikipedia suggestion row for missing 'Recommended' label, incorrect title format, and icon size mismatches
refined_analysis.technical_details: Update the Wikipedia suggestion row rendering function(s) inside 'browser/components/urlbar/UrlbarProviderQuickSuggest.sys.mjs' to add the 'Recommended' label below the suggestion text and resize icons to match the Figma design specifications. Defer changes to the suggestion title formatting until backend data updates from RS and Merino are available. Related UI adjustments may also be required in components under 'browser/components/firefox-suggest/'.
refined_analysis.user_impact: Improves UI clarity and consistency of Wikipedia suggestions in the Firefox address bar, aligning them with updated design standards and enhancing user experience.
refined_analysis.proposed_fix_approach: Modify the Wikipedia suggestion row rendering logic in 'UrlbarProviderQuickSuggest.sys.mjs' to insert the 'Recommended' label beneath the suggestion text and adjust icon sizes based on Figma specifications. Postpone updating the suggestion title format until backend data changes from RS and Merino are integrated. Verify related UI components in 'browser/components/firefox-suggest/' for necessary updates.
refined_analysis.optimized_context: Fix Wikipedia suggestion row UI in 'browser/components/urlbar/UrlbarProviderQuickSuggest.sys.mjs' and 'browser/components/firefox-suggest/' by adding the missing 'Recommended' label below suggestions and correcting icon sizes per the latest Figma design. Defer title formatting changes until backend data from RS and Merino is available.
refined_analysis.refinement_critique: The analysis clearly identifies the UI bug and its symptoms but is somewhat verbose and lacks explicit references to exact functions or UI components within the mentioned files, reducing AI-readiness. The root cause is described but could be more concise and focused. The reproduction steps and symptoms are clear and scoped well. The proposed fix approach is high-level but does not explicitly specify which UI elements or functions to modify, nor clearly delimit the scope of deferral for the title format update. The technical details mention affected files but do not pinpoint the precise rendering functions or components involved. The analysis is mostly self-contained but contains some redundant context and could better emphasize actionable guidance for the fix.

filtered_context.concise_summary: In 'browser/components/urlbar/UrlbarProviderQuickSuggest.sys.mjs' and 'browser/components/firefox-suggest/', update the Wikipedia suggestion row UI to add the missing 'Recommended' label below the suggestion text and resize icons to match the latest Figma design. Postpone changes to suggestion title formatting until backend updates from RS and Merino are available.
core_symptoms: Wikipedia suggestions lack the 'Recommended' label below suggestion text
Icons are rendered at incorrect sizes compared to design specs
technical_constraints: Defer suggestion title formatting updates until backend data changes from RS and Merino are integrated
